design_philosophy: A high-end, academic analytics tool. Combines the precision of a technical command center with the premium, deep aesthetic of a modern university research lab. Avoids generic SaaS looks by using deep obsidian backgrounds, pure white text, and rich sapphire/cyan accents.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more padding than standard apps. p-8 or p-12 for main containers.

forms_and_inputs.styling: Dark backgrounds (bg-[#0A1128]), sharp 1px borders (border-slate-800), focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500. No heavy shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-500 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-all

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-[#0A1128]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]
cards.prediction_result: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#111B3D] to-[#0A1128] border border-blue-900/50 rounded-xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden

charts.styling: Use brand accents (Cyan, Blue, Purple) against dark backgrounds. Ensure axis text is slate-400.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have clear hover states. Cards slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and border lightens.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion: Fade in and slide up slightly for page content.
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: Dashboard items must load with a staggered entrance animation.

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D glass spheres and glowing interconnected nodes floating over a deep sapphire blue background.
hero_background.usage: Use as a full-screen background image in the Home hero section. MUST use an overlay like `bg-black/60` or `bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050A15] via-[#050A15]/80 to-transparent` to ensure text readability.

dashboard_texture.description: Deep oceanic blue radial gradient background with subtle digital noise texture.
dashboard_texture.usage: Use as the fixed background for the entire application or specifically the dashboard to give it a premium, textured feel.

student_studying.description: Man sitting at a desk working on a laptop computer at night.
student_studying.usage: Can be used in the 'About' or 'How it Works' section. Wrap in a container with a subtle blue tint overlay to match the theme.

abstract_data.description: 3D render abstract digital visualization depicting neural networks and AI.
abstract_data.usage: Use alongside the prediction form or in a side column to reinforce the Machine Learning aspect.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion, Python (FastAPI), Scikit-learn, MongoDB.
instructions_to_main_agent.ml_requirements: Generate a clean synthetic dataset for student performance. Build a pipeline for data preprocessing, model selection (evaluate Linear Regression, Random Forest, Decision Tree, Gradient Boosting), and deploy the best model. Expose an endpoint via FastAPI.
instructions_to_main_agent.frontend_structure: Create a hybrid full-stack structure. Implement a responsive Navbar. Include Pages: Home, Prediction Form, Dashboard. Implement Shadcn inputs for the 9 specified form fields.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_requirements: Store predictions in MongoDB. Create a dashboard that visualizes prediction history using Shadcn charts (e.g., trend of predicted scores, pie chart of performance categories).
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility_and_testing: Include `data-testid` on all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="predict-submit-button"`, `data-testid="prediction-score"`). Ensure hover contrast rules are met.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Install and use `lucide-react` for standard UI icons, or `@phosphor-icons/react` for high-end analytics iconography.
